RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd, matplotlib.pyplot as plt, os

path="/mnt/data/assistant-RotRc5jB5S2NmDtk7X6Gq2-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df=pd.read_csv(path)

# Filter TRANSPORTATION sector (case-insensitive)
sector_col=[c for c in df.columns if c.lower()=="sector"]
if sector_col:
    sector_col=sector_col[0]
else:
    sector_col=None

op_col_candidates=[c for c in df.columns if "operating" in c.lower() and "profit" in c.lower()]
op_col=op_col_candidates[0] if op_col_candidates else None

period_candidates=[c for c in df.columns if c.lower() in ["quarter","period","date","fiscal_quarter","reporting_period","year_quarter"]]
period_col=period_candidates[0] if period_candidates else None

company_candidates=[c for c in df.columns if c.lower() in ["company","company_name","ticker","symbol","name"]]
company_col=company_candidates[0] if company_candidates else None

sector_df=df.copy()
if sector_col:
    sector_df=sector_df[sector_df[sector_col].astype(str).str.upper()=="TRANSPORTATION"]

# Aggregate operating profit by quarter (if available), else overall
if op_col is None:
    raise ValueError("Operating profit column not found.")
    
plot_df=None
title=""
if period_col:
    plot_df=sector_df.groupby(period_col, as_index=False)[op_col].sum().sort_values(period_col)
    x=plot_df[period_col].astype(str)
    y=plot_df[op_col]
    title="TRANSPORTATION sector - Operating Profit by Period (Sum)"
    xlabel=period_col
else:
    # by company
    if company_col:
        plot_df=sector_df.groupby(company_col, as_index=False)[op_col].sum().sort_values(op_col, ascending=False).head(20)
        x=plot_df[company_col].astype(str)
        y=plot_df[op_col]
        title="TRANSPORTATION sector - Operating Profit by Company (Top 20, Sum)"
        xlabel=company_col
    else:
        plot_df=pd.DataFrame({"TRANSPORTATION":[sector_df[op_col].sum()]})
        x=plot_df.index.astype(str); y=plot_df["TRANSPORTATION"]
        title="TRANSPORTATION sector - Operating Profit (Sum)"
        xlabel=""

plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))
plt.bar(x, y, color="#1f77b4")
plt.title(title)
plt.xlabel(xlabel)
plt.ylabel(op_col)
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha="right")
plt.tight_layout()

out_png="/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=200)
out_png

content.text:
I created a bar chart for the **TRANSPORTATION** sector showing **Operating Profit (sum) by company** (top companies in that sector based on the CSV).

Download the chart here:  
[Download the bar chart (PNG)](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png)
